body:
Hey Leo, thanks for the note — really appreciate you flagging this. I've been watching [Meridian Grid](startups/meridian-grid) closely over the past few months and I think you're right that their storage-layer approach is differentiated in a way that's hard to replicate quickly. We'd be open to co-leading if the valuation lands somewhere sensible; the numbers I've seen floating around are a bit rich for seed, but I imagine there's room to work with the founders on that. Would love to connect later this week to align on terms before we both go back to them — are you free Thursday afternoon?

Amara
